payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with a recessed rectangular door panel and a narrow vertical seam/handle; matte finish with a small surface blemish, appears partial and cut off at the right edge of the crop, photographed from approximately 1.0 m away.
